note: Suggested keys for the Environment variables tool; operators can add any NAME=value.

keys.hint: Dashboard listen port (defaults.port in config/dashboard-surface.v1.json; HTTPS proxy may use MEIMEI_DASHBOARD_PORT)
development | preview | production — which scoped vars apply to process.env
Set to 1 / true / yes to reject new keys that are not APP_IDENTIFIER_VARNAME or POSIX allowlist (PORT, HOME, …)
Reference app (queue): 1/true/yes/on to enable /790/Reference_app_1 enqueue UI
Optional max prompt length for reference app (default 8000)
Set to 0 to disable Reference App 2 inbox loop in dashboard process
Poll interval ms for app_task inbox (default 2500)
Optional shared secret for POST /api/llm/gateway/generate (header x-meimei-llm-secret). If unset, only loopback may call the gateway.
Local Next.js origin for checklist reverse proxy (default http://127.0.0.1:3000). Set none|false|0|off to show runtime shell only at /727/Checklist
Path on Next app (default /checklist) — must match next.config basePath
node (default, in-MeiMei SQLite+Ollama) or python (legacy HTTP worker + MEIMEI_AGENT_CHAPPIE_ROOT)
Path to moldovancsaba/checklist clone — required only when ENGINE=python
Set to 1 so MeiMei spawns python3 scripts/worker_bridge.py on first bridge request
Must match AGENT_SHARED_SECRET for worker + Next.js; injected on /api/agent-chappie/bridge
Neon Postgres URL for worker + online queue (mirrors checklist DATABASE_URL)
Hosted checklist origin (no trailing path), e.g. https://checklist.messmass.com — for npm run agent-chappie:queue-consumer
Same secret as hosted app worker queue (x-agent-worker-secret); pairs with APP_QUEUE_BASE_URL
Checklist weekly pipeline: full URL to POST /api/llm/gateway/generate (MeiMei dashboard). Same contract as MEIMEI_LLM_GATEWAY_URL.
Ollama model name for weekly pipeline when using MeiMei gateway (falls back to OLLAMA_MODEL / LOCAL_LLM_MODEL)
Optional x-meimei-llm-secret for Next server → gateway when not loopback; mirrors MEIMEI_LLM_GATEWAY_SECRET
